functional_audit.check: Presentation-only reusable accepts pathsession-shaped prop and renders bound header, question list, reflection checkbox, and submit without placeholder copy
Controlled callbacks (onAnswerChange, onReflectionChange, onSubmit) wire interactive fields; read-only when callbacks omitted

ui_evidence.notes: Root form uses Group_card_ via bubbleStyle; vertical column stack matches IR child order (bTJBC→bTIyn→bTIzA→bTIzS→bTIzk)
Header group binds title_text and coaching_text_text from session prop
Marker matches decompose AC; canonical IR element id is bTIys with style_ref Text_heading_2_ — style applied correctly
Marker matches decompose AC; canonical IR element id is bTIyt with style_ref Text_body_muted_ — style applied correctly
RepeatingGroup_list_ on container; maps session.questions; bTJBI plugin stub nested inside per IR parent_id
SessionQuestionCell cell group per pathquestion row
Reflection group; child order bTIzY(1)→bTIzX(4)→bTIzc(5) matches Bubble order properties
Checkbox_default_; label 'Set as focus' from IR checkbox label expression
Inert hidden stub for Maestro plugin (order 2 at root)
Inert hidden stub inside RepeatingGroup bTIzA

critiques.finding: Title and subtitle nodes use data-bubble-id bTIxC/bTIxG (Bubble JSON keys) while ir/inventory.json canonical element ids are bTIys/bTIyt; automated parity selectors keyed on canonical ids would miss these nodes.
critiques.alternative: Align markers to canonical IR ids (bTIys, bTIyt) or document the key→id alias in path-conventions for design-system reusables.

critiques.finding: Checkbox label 'Set as focus' is rendered as a sibling htmlFor label rather than on the Checkbox component's label prop as in Bubble (bTIyC.properties.label).
critiques.alternative: Pass label to the shadcn Checkbox wrapper or add data-bubble-id on the label span if downstream parity tooling expects label co-located with the checkbox element.

critiques.finding: Textarea min-h-[96px] is a hard-coded Tailwind value not sourced from IR presentation or MultiLineInput_default_ style properties.
critiques.alternative: Derive min-height from styles.json Input_multiline_/MultiLineInput_default_ or remove if fluid fit_height is sufficient.
